$comment: JSON Schema for one audit bundle's structured output. Pass as the `schema` to each per-bundle audit agent so findings come back validated + uniform. The disposition fields (confidence, complexity, blast_radius, surface) drive the auto-fix-vs-review gate — see SKILL.md.

severity.$comment: high = would cause a coding mistake (dead code, missing try/catch, wrong API use); medium = wrong mental model; low = clarity

complexity.$comment: mechanical = a localised factual correction (count/date/enum/line-ref/name/clearly-wrong clause); substantive = a rewrite encoding judgment, or a gap-fill that adds new explanatory text

blast_radius.$comment: local = a comment scoped to one function/section; wide = a contract docstring many callers depend on, or cross-cutting

surface.$comment: doc-file + config are NEVER auto-fixed regardless of the other factors

problem.$comment: precise — reference what the code actually does

summary.$comment: files audited, overall comment health, count by severity
